title: knautia arvensis var. carpathica
intro: Knautia arvensis var. carpathica, also known as field scabious or Carpathian knautia, is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is a subspecies of the knautia arvensis. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis var. carpathica include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Knautia arvensis var. carpathica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
